news.summary: A recent report indicates that the global carbon emissions have increased by over 2.5 billion tons in the past year, reaching a record high of 37.1 billion tons. This rise is attributed to an increased reliance on fossil fuels for energy production and transportation. The report also highlights a concerning trend of rising methane levels, with atmospheric concentrations reaching 1877 parts per billion, the highest in over 800,000 years. Experts warn that urgent action is needed to curb these emissions and prevent further damage to the environment.
news.headline: Investigation on critical minerals by Trump for possible new tariffs. -Bloomberg,com.

news.summary: A recent report reveals that the global economy is projected to grow by 4.7% in 2021, higher than the previous estimate of 4.6%. However, this growth is expected to slow down to 4.3% in 2022. Inflation rates are forecasted to increase by 3.9% this year, significantly higher than the initial expectation of 3.2%. Additionally, global trade volumes are expected to rise by 9.7% in 2021, compared to the earlier projection of 8.4%. Despite these positive indicators, uncertainties surrounding the COVID-19 pandemic and geopolitical tensions pose risks to the economic recovery. It is crucial for policymakers to implement measures to navigate these challenges and sustain growth momentum.
news.headline: Callie Cox suggests weak sentiment could be a good buying chance.

news.summary: Delek US Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: DK) from Brentwood, Tennessee, has revealed plans to release a press statement detailing their first quarter performance for 2025 before the opening of the U.S. stock market on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. A conference call to delve into these results is set to commence at 10:00 a.m. CT (11:00 a.m. ET) on the same day. Interested parties can tune into the live broadcast of the call by visiting www.DelekUS.com and navigating to the investor section.

news.summary: In Brentwood, Tenn., Delek Logistics Partners, LP (NYSE: DKL) revealed plans to release a press statement detailing its first quarter 2025 performance before the U.S. stock market opens on Wednesday, May 7, 2025. news.summary: Montreal, 15th April 2025 - Theratechnologies Inc. ("Theratechnologies" or "the Company"), a commercial-stage biopharmaceutical firm listed on the TSX as TH and on NASDAQ as THTX, has announced plans to potentially sell the company after considering current circumstances and a proposal from Future Pak. The Board of Directors has opted for an open and non-exclusive evaluation process, with a Special Committee of independent directors overseeing the process. Supporting this initiative, Barclays and Fasken are financial and legal advisors respectively, while Raymond James and Norton Rose Fulbright have been engaged as independent financial and legal advisors.
news.headline: Theratechnologies considers sale process, Board authorizes evaluation of sale through open process with Special Committee overseeing.

news.summary: In recent statistics released, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the United States has decreased to 4.5%, with the creation of over 400,000 jobs during the past month. Additionally, the stock market showed significant growth with the S&P 500 reaching a record high of 4,500 points. Experts believe that these positive economic indicators are a result of increased consumer confidence and business activity. It is anticipated that this trend will continue in the coming months, providing a boost to the overall economy.
news.headline: New data: Consumer spending to rise by 4% in 2025. #Insights #Economy

news.summary: Ascot Resources Ltd., based in Vancouver, British Columbia, recently disclosed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2024. Trading under TSX: AOT and OTCQX: AOTVF, the company's audited consolidated financial statements are now available for review. Interested parties can access documents such as Management's Discussion and Analysis and the Annual Information Form pertaining to the mentioned period on SEDAR+ website at www.sedarplus.ca. news.summary: ValOre Metals Corp. and South Atlantic Gold Inc. have announced an amalgamation agreement on March 26, 2025. ValOre will acquire all South Atlantic Shares and securities, with South Atlantic and ValOre Subco amalgamating under the Business Corporations Act (British Columbia). The resulting company, Amalco, will be a wholly-owned subsidiary of ValOre. The transaction follows a joint news release on February 17, 2025. ValOre is listed on TSX-V (VO), OTCQB (KVLQF), and Frankfurt (KEQ0), while South Atlantic is listed on TSX-V (SAO).
news.headline: ValOre acquires South Atlantic Gold to create large precious metals district in Brazil, totaling 99,924 hectares.

news.summary: After undergoing restructuring, Biora has transitioned into a privately held company. With long-term financing in place, the company is set to expedite the development of the BioJet™ platform to capitalize on market opportunities.
news.headline: Biora Therapeutics completes restructuring, now private with long-term funding for BioJet™ platform development.

news.summary: The Management board of AS PRFoods, a company with registration code 11560713 located at Pärnu mnt 141, Tallinn 11314, and ISIN EE3100101031, known as PRFoods, is suggesting to shareholders the adoption of resolutions without holding a meeting in accordance with § 299 1 of the Commercial Code.
news.headline: PRFoods proposes resolutions without a meeting. AS PRFoods, code 11560713, suggest adopting resolutions without convening a meeting.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that there has been an increase of 15% in the unemployment rate, with over 2.5 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant drop of 10% in response to this news. This spike in unemployment and market decline have raised concerns about the overall economic stability in the country. Experts are closely monitoring the situation for any further impact on the financial sector and job market. The government is also taking measures to address the growing unemployment crisis and stabilize the economy.
news.headline: Company considers strategic options for future growth.

news.summary: On April 8, 2025, Vincerx Pharma, Inc. (Nasdaq: VINC) from San Mateo, California, revealed the termination of a non-binding Letter of Intent (LOI) with Global Digital Holdings Inc., known as QumulusAI, concerning a potential merger.
news.headline: Vincerx Pharma terminates Letter of Intent with QumulusAI; to pursue wind-down activities.

news.summary: On April 9, 2025, Clear Blue Technologies International Inc. (TSXV: CBLU) (FRA: 0YA) (OTCQB: CBUTF) announced updates to its Financing Agreements with RE Royalties. The revised agreement includes changes to the terms previously disclosed.
news.headline: Clear Blue Technologies (TSXV: CBLU) finalizes balance sheet restructuring, enhancing growth prospects with Financing Agreements adjustment.

news.summary: The recent transfer of the Hawthorne Collective signifies a shift towards separating cannabis investments and prioritizing expansion in the primary lawn and garden sector. This move underscores a strategic pivot to boost growth in the core business while distancing from cannabis-related ventures. The decision to transfer the Hawthorne Collective highlights a deliberate emphasis on diversification and amplifying the focus on the lawn and garden business. The move is aimed at driving increased growth in the primary sector, with a renewed attention on expanding market presence and enhancing revenue streams. This strategic redirection is pivotal in capitalizing on the lucrative opportunities in the lawn and garden industry.
news.headline: ScottsMiracle-Gro transferring Hawthorne Collective to separate cannabis, focus on core business growth.

news.summary: Currency Exchange International, Corp. (CXI) has recently partnered with CCE, a prominent Canadian retailer specializing in foreign exchange services. CCE, a subsidiary of DUCA, boasts 19 branch locations throughout Ontario and provides a wide array of financial services in over 120 currencies, including digital products, foreign exchange conversions, and money transfers. Since its inception in 1954, DUCA has expanded from a single branch credit union in Toronto to 19 branches across the Greater Toronto Area and Central Ontario. With over 93,000 Members and total assets exceeding $8.3 billion, the company has established itself as a key player in the financial services sector.
news.headline: Currency Exchange International, Corp. collaborates with Continental Currency Exchange, offering foreign exchange services across Ontario, with CCE having 19 branch locations, over 120 currencies, and $8.3 billion in assets.

news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 11, 2025, Fortuna Mining Corp. (NYSE: FSM | TSX: FVI) announced that it has finalized a deal to sell its ownership in Roxgold Sanu SA, the parent company of the Yaramoko Mine, along with three other wholly-owned Burkina Faso subsidiaries, to Soleil Resources International Limited (SRI). SRI, a private Mauritius-based firm, currently operates three mines, holds exploration permits, and owns a drilling company in Burkina Faso. This transaction marks Fortuna's exit from operations in Burkina Faso.
news.headline: Fortuna sells Yaramoko Mine in Burkina Faso to SRI for undisclosed amount, ceases operations in country.

news.summary: In Newport Beach, California, Institutional Property Advisors recently facilitated the sale of two Class A office towers at 5000 Birch Street. The deal marks a significant transaction in the region's commercial real estate market.
news.headline: Institutional Property Advisors sells two Class A office towers in Newport Beach, California. #5000birchstreet.

news.summary: In St. Thomas, U.S. Virgin Islands, on April 15, 2025, the U.S. Virgin Islands Department of Tourism wrapped up a productive week at Seatrade Cruise Global 2025 in Miami, Florida. The event is a major gathering for the cruise industry. The focus was on enhancing partnerships with impressive results.
news.headline: U.S. Virgin Islands shines at Seatrade Cruise Global 2025 in Miami, Florida, showcasing tourism success. #PRNewswire

news.summary: Arena Group Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: AREN) revealed its financial results for the fourth quarter of 2024, showing quarterly revenue of $36.2 million. Arena is a renowned technology platform and media company housing numerous media brands such as TheStreet, Parade Media (“Parade”), Men’s Journal, Surfer, Powder, and Athlon Sports. The data covers the period ending December 31, 2024, marking a strong performance for the company during this timeframe.
news.headline: Arena Group reported $7.2 million income in Q4 2024, delivering second consecutive profitable quarter with $36.2 million revenue.

news.summary: Several key stock market indexes are currently facing challenges as they hover around their 21-day moving averages. Notably, Palantir, a leading growth stock, is showing promising signs of a buying opportunity. Dow Jones Futures have declined following resistance in the stock market, with Palantir's buy signal catching investors' attention.
news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop as stock market faces resistance, Palantir shows buy signal.Indexes near 21-day lines.
White House statement on Trump action.

news.summary: A hacker compromised a ZKsync admin account on April 15, minting $5 million worth of unclaimed airdrop tokens by exploiting a function called sweepUnclaimed(), increasing the total token supply by 0.45%. The attacker still holds control of most stolen funds. ZKsync is working with the Security Alliance (SEAL) for recovery efforts. The hack disrupted the ZK token's price, dropping 16% initially and later rebounding to $0.047. ZKsync's ZK token had volatile price movements, down 7% within 24 hours. The total value locked on ZKsync was $57.3 million as per DefiLlama. $2 billion has been lost in crypto hacks in Q1 2025, nearly as much as the total loss in 2024.
news.headline: Hacker nabs $5M in ZK tokens via admin account breach. 111M tokens minted; ZK price sees 7% drop. $2B lost to hacks in Q1 2025.

news.summary: A company based in Forest City, Iowa, Rural Development Partners (RDP), recently granted $17.5 million in financial assistance through New Markets Tax Credit (NMTC) to MagPro, LLC, a Nonferrous Metal Production and Processing business situated in Camden, Tennessee. This funding has been allocated to support the acquisition of essential equipment and aid the company in their operations.
news.headline: RDP grants $17.5M to MagPro in New Markets Tax Credit, boosting production and jobs in America.

This translates to approximately 10.5 million people currently out of work. The report also highlighted a growing concern as youth unemployment surged to 15.2%, affecting nearly 3.8 million individuals aged between 18-25. Economists suggest that these alarming figures are a result of the ongoing pandemic and its economic impact. The government has vowed to implement measures to address this issue and create more job opportunities in the coming months.

news.summary: In Winnipeg, Manitoba, on April 15, 2025, NFI Group Inc. (TSX: NFI, OTC: NFYEF, TSX: NFI.DB), a prominent provider of bus and coach mobility solutions, revealed that Colin Robertson, the former Vice Chair of the Board, has been named as the new Chairman of the Board. This appointment comes as Chan Galbato, the previous Chair, has chosen to resign from the Board for alternative endeavors. In the restructuring, NFI Vice Chair Larry Edwards will now serve as the Lead Independent Director.
news.headline: NFI Group Inc. appoints Colin Robertson as Chair of the Board, succeeding Chan Galbato who stepped down. Larry Edwards to become Lead Independent Director.

(TSX: BABY) (OTCQX: BABYF) (FSE: 0YL) has released a bi-weekly default status report as required by the National Policy 12-203 Management Cease Trade Orders. news.summary: In YOKOHAMA, Japan, FUJIFILM Electronic Materials has been awarded the prestigious Intel EPIC Supplier Award for 2025. This accolade is given to the top performers in the Intel supply chain who have shown exceptional dedication to continuous improvement and outstanding performance. The award acknowledges the efforts of FUJIFILM Electronic Materials across its 20 global manufacturing locations in maintaining excellence over the past year. The company is proud to receive this recognition from Intel for their unwavering commitment to delivering high-quality products.
news.headline: FUJIFILM Electronic Materials wins Intel’s 2025 EPIC Supplier Award for world-class performance excellence.

news.summary: Figment has been chosen as the staking provider for 3iQ's approved Solana ETF in Canada, demonstrating the country's embrace of digital asset products. The ETF is set to launch on the Toronto Stock Exchange on April 16 under the ticker SOLQ. Figment serves over 700 clients and will facilitate institutional staking for this ETF. The Ontario Securities Commission authorized 3iQ's SOL fund on April 14, allowing other managers like Purpose, Evolve, and CI to offer SOL ETFs. 3iQ anticipates yields of 6-8% for its SOL fund. Canada has been proactive in adopting crypto-related funds, with 3iQ seeing success with its Bitcoin and Ether ETFs. US regulators are also moving towards approving staking rewards. In the US, such ETFs garnered $38 billion in net inflows in their first year. This development showcases Canada's leadership in cryptocurrency ETFs as compared to the US.
news.headline: 3iQ's Canadian Solana ETF partners with Figment for staking. Approved by OSC, launches April 16 with ticker SOLQ. Expected 6-8% yield.

news.summary: A recent report showed that spot Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) witnessed approximately $872 million in net outflows from April 3 to April 10, sparking concerns about waning interest in Bitcoin. The selling pressure intensified due to global trade tensions and recession fears, with ETF net flows dropping to below $2 million on April 11 and April 14. Bitcoin has maintained a stable price around $83,000 for five weeks, indicating a lack of interest from traders. While some view this as a sign of Bitcoin's maturity as an asset, others deem it disappointing compared to gold's 23% gain in 2025, reaching $3,245. Despite Bitcoin outperforming the S&P 500 by 4% in the last 30 days, worries persist about its appeal as an uncorrelated and reliable store of value. The spot Bitcoin ETF market's average daily trading volume exceeds $2 billion, close to gold ETFs and ahead of US Treasurys ETFs, despite being relatively new compared to these assets. Currently, spot Bitcoin ETFs hold approximately $94.6 billion in assets under management, surpassing the market capitalization of various prominent companies. Major investors in Bitcoin ETFs include well-known entities like Brevan Howard and D.E. Shaw, revealing growing interest from institutional players. As Bitcoin ETFs gain traction, they may eventually feature in global indexes, attracting more passive funds and boosting trading activity. The present weak net inflows or outflows should not be interpreted as a sign of weakness and may not indicate a decline in Bitcoin's potential. The article serves as general information and not investment advice, with the opinions expressed solely belonging to the author.
news.headline: Bitcoin ETFs experienced $872 million in net outflows from April 3 to April 10, sparking concerns about waning interest. Trading volume hit $2.24 billion on April 14. BTC's stability near $83,000 for five weeks suggests lackluster demand. Despite lower volume than gold, ETFs show promise with top institutional holders and potential inclusion in global indices.

news.summary: The imposition of reciprocal tariffs and an additional 50% tax on Chinese imports at midnight could push Trump tariffs closer to the $1 trillion tax increase mark. As a result, the S&P 500 is facing a decline in response to these developments.
news.headline: $1 trillion tax hike from Trump tariffs takes effect at midnight, causing S&P 500 to drop.

news.summary: CleanSpark, a US Bitcoin miner, announced on April 15 that it will sell a portion of its Bitcoin earnings each month to achieve financial independence. They also secured a $200 million credit line backed by Bitcoin through Coinbase Prime. CleanSpark has established an institutional Bitcoin trading desk for these sales. This move aims to self-fund operations, boost their Bitcoin holdings, and support expansion. This decision comes as mining stocks, including CoinShares Crypto Miners ETF, have declined over 40% since the beginning of the year. The decrease in stock prices increases miners' cost of capital and may accelerate loan repayments. Analysts attribute the downturn to declining cryptocurrency prices exacerbated by the Bitcoin network's halving in April 2024. US Bitcoin miners, facing potential trade wars due to import tariffs, are taking strategic steps to remain competitive. CleanSpark believes their financial self-sufficiency will set them apart from peers reliant on equity dilution or increased leverage. Other miners are also adapting to market shifts, like Bitdeer planning to manufacture mining hardware in the US to counter the impact of tariffs.
news.headline: CleanSpark's Bitcoin pivot involves selling some BTC monthly, securing a $200M credit facility with Coinbase Prime. Other miners facing challenges amid 2025 selloffs and trade war uncertainties. CleanSpark aims for self-sufficiency.

news.summary: Amidst a surge in Treasury yields and escalating risks of a recession, the Federal Reserve is likely to intervene. The 10-year Treasury Yield has experienced a notable spike, prompting concerns of economic downturn. The uncertainties surrounding Trump's tariffs have contributed to the market volatility, resulting in bearish trends for the S&P 500. The situation has raised the possibility of the Federal Reserve's intervention to stabilize the economy.
news.headline: Federal Reserve may intervene due to spiking Treasury yields amid risk of recession, impacting S&P 500.
